name: Mute in Feeds
author: kindgracekind
description: Mute an account exclusively in feeds

name: Also Liked
author: kindgracekind
description: Shows posts also liked by the people who liked the post you're viewing.

name: Post Signatures
author: kindgracekind
description: Add a custom signature to the end of every post.

name: Open in PDSls
author: Jython1415
description: Open a post or profile's raw atproto record in PDSls.

name: Hide Popular Posts
author: Jython1415
description: Hide posts at or above a configurable like count (default 1000) from your feeds.

name: Syntax Highlighting
author: kindgracekind
description: Renders Markdown-style inline code and fenced code blocks in posts
